title: Hono
excerpt: description: Create a Hono application and deploy it to Cloudflare Workers with Workers Assets. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. **Start from CLI** \- scaffold a full-stack app with a Hono API, React SPA and the [Cloudflare Vite plugin](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/vite-plugin/) for lightning-fast development. npm create cloudflare@latest -- my-hono-app --template=cloudflare/templates/vite-react-template
